steps.title: Identify What Needs Emphasis
steps.content: The student's task is explicit: emphasize a difference between the two seaweeds. The notes show one measurable difference—sugar kelp: moderate umami, ma-konbu: high umami. The answer must highlight this contrast.

steps.title: Apply the Signal
steps.content: C presents the comparison as “Although sugar kelp and ma-konbu are types of brown seaweed, the latter's umami flavor is more intense,” using a structure that pivots from shared classification to the intensity difference. A treats the seaweeds identically, B redirects attention to unrelated foods, and D merely repeats their shared classification. That matches choice C — C is correct.
